subcodes.first_line: O thou faithful servant of Bahá'u'lláh! Thy letter hath been received, conveying glad tidings of the exaltation of the Word of God and progress [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده صادق حضرت بهاء الله نامه شما رسید و بشارت اعلاء کلمه الله و ترقی
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @martyrs and martyrdom, @Judaism; the Torah; the Jewish people, @unity; oneness of humanity, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life
